name: Delaurenti's Tiramisu
recipeIngredient: 1 Small Piece Semisweet Chocolate - to shave
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together the sugar and egg yolks. Gradually add the mascarpone and continue stirring until the mixture becomes creamy. In another bowl, whip the egg whites to a meringue consistency (stiff peaks). Carefully fold the meringue into the mascarpone mixture.
2. Dip enough ladyfingers or biscuits in brewed espresso to line an 8-by-8-inch pan or glass serving dish. Spread half of the mascarpone mixture over the ladyfingers, followed by a light dusting of cocoa and shaving of chocolate. Repeat with another layer of ladyfingers, mascarpone mixture, cocoa, and chocolate.
3. Gently shake the pan to settle the ingredients, then chill at least two hours (overnight is preferable) before serving. Cut into portions and serve.
